name: Overnight Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz package frozen green peas, thawed
1 15-16 oz can red kidney beans, drained
1 16 oz can cut green beans, drained
1 12 oz can white whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the vegetables and pimiento.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture over the vegetables and toss to coat.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours, stirring occasionally.
